param.name: mass_tolerance_ppm
param.label: Mass tolerance [ppm]
param.help: Mass tolerance in ppm for database matching.

param.name: time_tolerance
param.label: Retention time tolerance [s]
param.help: Retention time tolerance in seconds for finding peaks derived from the same parent compound.

param.name: correlation_threshold
param.label: Correlation threshold
param.help: Correlation threshold between peaks to qualify as adducts/isotopes of the same metabolite.

param.name: min_cluster_size
param.label: Minimum cluster size
param.help: The minimum number of nodes to be considered as a cluster.

param.name: deep_split
param.label: Deep split
param.help: Deep split provides a rough control over sensitivity to cluster splitting. The higher the value, the more and smaller clusters will be produced (see WGCNA package documentation).

param.name: network_type
param.label: Network type
param.help: Network type parameter affects how the network's adjacency matrix is created from the correlation matrix (see WGCNA package documentation).

param.name: adduct_weights
param.label: Adduct weights table
param.help: A weight-by-adduct table used for scoring annotations.

param.name: mass_defect_precision
param.label: Precision for computing mass defect
param.help: Number of decimal places to round mass defect values.

param.name: peak_rt_width
param.label: Estimated chromatographic peak width
param.help: Expected chromatographic peak width in seconds for RT clustering.

param.name: intensity_deviation_tolerance
param.label: Tolerance of intensity deviation
param.help: A numeric threshold by which an intensity ratio of two isotopic peaks may differ from their actual abundance ratio.

param.name: mass_defect_tolerance
param.label: Tolerance of mass defect
param.help: Maximum difference in mass defect between two peaks of the same compound.

param.name: maximum_isotopes
param.label: Maximum isotopes
param.help: Maximum number of isotopes to consider.

param.name: min_ions_per_chemical
param.label: Minimum ions per chemical
param.help: Minimum number of adducts/isotopes required for a high-confidence match.

param.name: intensity_table
param.label: Intensity table
param.help: Table with intensities** for features (rows) across samples (columns).

param.name: compound_table
param.label: Compound database
param.help: Database of compounds according to which the annotation is performed. The database is required to contain the fields compound_id, monoisotopic_mass, and molecular_formula.

param.name: adduct_table
param.label: Adduct database
param.help: Database of adduct which is combined with the database of compound to form a molecule-adduct pairs. The database is required to contain adduct, charge, mass, and n_molecules.

param.name: mass_tolerance_ppm
param.label: Mass tolerance [ppm]
param.help: Mass tolerance in ppm for database matching.
